appcast.title: Prashant Update
appcast.item:
Version 1.0.13
- Swipeable Profile (Real Photo & AI Avatar) 📸 - Advanced Stories with Music & Mentions 🎵 - Snapchat-style Snaps (One-time view & Screenshot alerts) 🛡️ - AI Persona: Prashant (100% Reliable) 🤖 - Account Security (Deactivate/Delete/Password Change) 🔑 - Bug fixes and performance improvements.
Mon, 20 Jan 2025 12:00:00 +0000
<enclosure url="
Version 1.0.13
- Swipeable Profile (Real Photo & AI Avatar) 📸 - Advanced Stories with Music & Mentions 🎵 - Snapchat-style Snaps (One-time view & Screenshot alerts) 🛡️ - AI Persona: Prashant (100% Reliable) 🤖 - Account Security (Deactivate/Delete/Password Change) 🔑 - Bug fixes and performance improvements.
Mon, 20 Jan 2025 12:00:00 +0000
" sparkle:version="1.0.13" sparkle:os="android" />
